pve_actions.name: Malefic
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 150.

pve_actions.name: Benefic
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 500
Additional Effect: 15% chance next Benefic II will restore critical HP
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Combust
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage over time.
Potency: 50
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Lightspeed
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces cast times for spells by 2.5 seconds.
Duration: 15s
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Helios
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 400

pve_actions.name: Ascend
pve_actions.effect: Resurrects target to a weakened state.

pve_actions.name: Essential Dignity
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 400
Potency increases up to 900 as the target's HP decreases, reaching its maximum value when the target has 30% HP or less.
Maximum Charges: 3

pve_actions.name: Benefic II
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 800

pve_actions.name: Astral Draw
pve_actions.effect:
Draws the Balance, the Arrow, the Spire, and the Lord of Crowns from your divining deck.
Additional Effect: Restores 20% of maximum MP
Upon execution, Play I changes to The Balance, Play II changes to The Arrow, Play III changes to The Spire, Minor Arcana changes to Lord of Crowns, and Astral Draw changes to Umbral Draw.
Shares a recast timer with Umbral Draw.

pve_actions.name: Umbral Draw
pve_actions.effect:
Draws the Spear, the Bole, the Ewer, and the Lady of Crowns from your divining deck.
Additional Effect: Restores 20% of maximum MP
Upon execution, Play I changes to The Spear, Play II changes to The Bole, Play III changes to The Ewer, Minor Arcana changes to Lady of Crowns, and Umbral Draw changes to Astral Draw.
Shares a recast timer with Astral Draw.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Astral Draw changes to Umbral Draw when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Play I
pve_actions.effect:
Plays the drawn arcanum after executing Astral Draw or Umbral Draw.
Astral Draw Effect: Action changes to The Balance
Umbral Draw Effect: Action changes to The Spear

pve_actions.name: Play II
pve_actions.effect:
Plays the drawn arcanum after executing Astral Draw or Umbral Draw.
Astral Draw Effect: Action changes to The Arrow
Umbral Draw Effect: Action changes to The Bole

pve_actions.name: Play III
pve_actions.effect:
Plays the drawn arcanum after executing Astral Draw or Umbral Draw.
Astral Draw Effect: Action changes to The Spire
Umbral Draw Effect: Action changes to The Ewer

pve_actions.name: Aspected Benefic
pve_actions.effect:
Restores target's HP.
Cure Potency: 250
Additional Effect: Regen
Cure Potency: 250
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Aspected Helios
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 250
Additional Effect: Regen
Cure Potency: 150
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Gravity
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 120 to target and all enemies nearby it.

pve_actions.name: Combust II
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage over time.
Potency: 60
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Synastry
pve_actions.effect:
Generate an aetheric bond with target party member. Each time you cast a single-target healing spell on yourself or a party member, the party member with whom you have the bond will also recover HP equaling 40% of the original spell.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Divination
pve_actions.effect:
Increases damage dealt by self and nearby party members by 6%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Divining
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Malefic II
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 160.

pve_actions.name: Collective Unconscious
pve_actions.effect:
Creates a celestial ring 8 yalms around the caster.
Duration: 18s
Additional Effect: Reduces damage taken by 10% for self and any party members within 30 yalms and applies Wheel of Fortune to self and any party members within 8 yalms
Duration: 10s
Wheel of Fortune Effect: Regen
Cure Potency: 100
Duration: 15s
Wheel of Fortune will be applied continuously to self and all party members standing within the celestial ring.
Collective Unconscious effect ends upon using another action or moving (including facing a different direction).
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Celestial Opposition
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 200
Additional Effect: Regen
Cure Potency: 100
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Earthly Star
pve_actions.effect:
Deploys an Earthly Star in the designated area and grants the effect of Earthly Dominance.
Duration: 10s
Executing Stellar Detonation while under the effect of Earthly Dominance creates a Stellar Burst dealing unaspected damage with a potency of 205 to all nearby enemies. Also restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 540
After 10s, Earthly Dominance effect is changed to Giant Dominance.
Duration: 10s
Waiting 10s or executing Stellar Detonation while under the effect of Giant Dominance creates a Stellar Explosion dealing unaspected damage with a potency of 310 to all nearby enemies. Also restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 720

pve_actions.name: Stellar Detonation
pve_actions.effect:
While under the effect of Earthly Dominance, detonates the currently deployed Earthly Star, creating a Stellar Burst that deals unaspected damage with a potency of 205 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members
Cure Potency: 540
While under the effect of Giant Dominance, detonates the currently deployed Earthly Star, creating a Stellar Explosion that deals unaspected damage with a potency of 310 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members
Cure Potency: 720

pve_actions.name: Malefic III
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 190.

pve_actions.name: Minor Arcana
pve_actions.effect:
Plays the drawn arcanum after executing Astral Draw or Umbral Draw.
Astral Draw Effect: Action changes to Lord of Crowns
Umbral Draw Effect: Action changes to Lady of Crowns

pve_actions.name: Combust III
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage over time.
Potency: 70
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Malefic IV
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 230.

pve_actions.name: Celestial Intersection
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own or target party member's HP.
Cure Potency: 200
Additional Sect Effect: Erects a magicked barrier which nullifies damage equaling 200% of the amount of HP restored
Duration: 30s
Maximum Charges: 2

pve_actions.name: Horoscope
pve_actions.effect:
Reads your fortune and those of nearby party members, granting them Horoscope.
Duration: 10s
Effect upgraded to Horoscope Helios upon receiving the effects of Helios or Helios Conjunction.
Duration: 30s
Restores the HP of those under either effect when the cards are read a second time or the effect expires.
Horoscope Cure Potency: 200
Horoscope Helios Cure Potency: 400

pve_actions.name: Horoscope
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Potency is determined by the Horoscope effect of party members. Effect expires upon execution.
Horoscope Potency: 200
Horoscope Helios Potency: 400

pve_actions.name: Neutral Sect
pve_actions.effect:
Increases healing magic potency by 20%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: When casting Aspected Benefic or Helios Conjunction, erects a magicked barrier which nullifies damage
Aspected Benefic Effect: Nullifies damage equaling 250% of the amount of HP restored
Helios Conjunction Effect: Nullifies damage equaling 125% of the amount of HP restored
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Suntouched
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Fall Malefic
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 270.

pve_actions.name: Gravity II
pve_actions.effect: Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 140 to target and all enemies nearby it.

pve_actions.name: Exaltation
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by self or target party member by 10%.
Duration: 8s
Additional Effect: Restores HP at the end of the effect's duration
Cure Potency: 500

pve_actions.name: Macrocosmos
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to all nearby enemies with a potency of 270 for the first enemy, and 40% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Macrocosmos to self and all nearby party members
Duration: 15s
For the effect's duration, 50% of damage taken is compiled.
Restores HP equal to a cure of 200 potency plus compiled damage when the effect expires or upon execution of Microcosmos.
Amount restored cannot exceed the target's maximum HP.
Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.

pve_actions.name: Microcosmos
pve_actions.effect:
Triggers the healing effect of Macrocosmos, restoring HP equal to a cure of 200 potency plus 50% of compiled damage.
Amount restored cannot exceed the target's maximum HP.

pve_actions.name: Oracle
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 860 for the first enemy and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while Divining.

pve_actions.name: Helios Conjunction
pve_actions.effect:
Restores own HP and the HP of all nearby party members.
Cure Potency: 250
Additional Effect: Regen
Cure Potency: 175
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Sun Sign
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by self and nearby party members by 10%.
Duration: 15s
Can only be executed while Suntouched.

traits.name: Maim and Mend
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 10%.

traits.name: Enhanced Benefic
traits.effect:
Grants a 15% chance that your next Benefic II will restore critical HP.
Duration: 15s

traits.name: Maim and Mend II
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 30%.

traits.name: Combust Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Combust to Combust II.

traits.name: Malefic Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Malefic to Malefic II.

traits.name: Malefic Mastery II
traits.effect: Upgrades Malefic II to Malefic III.

traits.name: Hyper Lightspeed
traits.effect: Reduces Lightspeed recast time to 60 seconds.

traits.name: Minor Arcana Mastery
traits.effect: Lord of Crowns can be drawn when executing Astral Draw, and Lady of Crowns can be drawn when executing Umbral Draw.

traits.name: Combust Mastery II
traits.effect: Upgrades Combust II to Combust III.

traits.name: Malefic Mastery III
traits.effect: Upgrades Malefic III to Malefic IV.

traits.name: Enhanced Essential Dignity
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Essential Dignity.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Malefic Mastery IV
traits.effect: Upgrades Malefic IV to Fall Malefic.

traits.name: Gravity Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Gravity to Gravity II.

traits.name: Enhanced Healing Magic
traits.effect: Increases the healing potency of Benefic to 500, Helios to 400, Benefic II to 800, Aspected Benefic to 250, Aspected Benefic's Regen effect to 250, Aspected Helios to 250, and Aspected Helios's Regen effect to 150.

traits.name: Enhanced Celestial Intersection
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Celestial Intersection.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Enhanced Divination
traits.effect:
Grants Divining upon executing Divination.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Magick Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Combust III's damage over time to 70, Fall Malefic to 270, Gravity II to 140, and Macrocosmos to 270.

traits.name: Aspected Helios Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Aspected Helios to Helios Conjunction.

traits.name: Enhanced Essential Dignity II
traits.effect: Allows a third charge of Essential Dignity.

traits.name: Enhanced Neutral Sect
traits.effect:
Grants Suntouched upon executing Neutral Sect.
Duration: 30s
